tools.name: search_plugins
tools.description: Search the ClaudeRegistry marketplace of Claude Code plugins by keyword and/or category. Returns matches with their install command.

tools.name: get_plugin
tools.description: Get the full details of a single ClaudeRegistry plugin by its id, including install commands and component counts.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List the distinct plugin categories in the ClaudeRegistry marketplace with a count of plugins in each, plus the total plugin count.
